Class WebCPUStrategy

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
public class WebCPUStrategy extends Object
Heuristic AI for CPU players. Reads bank and market state from a GameSession and picks Splendor actions in priority order: buy if possible, else reserve, else take two, else take three.

  • Constructor Details

    • WebCPUStrategy

      public WebCPUStrategy(GameSession session)
      Parameters:
      session - game state to query (same session the CPU is playing in)

  • Method Details

    • chooseAction

      public int chooseAction(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - the CPU player
      Returns:
      action code 1=take three different, 2=take two same, 3=reserve, 4=buy

    • chooseThreeTokenColors

      public String chooseThreeTokenColors(Player player)
      Picks up to three distinct colours that still have bank chips, in shuffled order, space-separated.
      Parameters:
      player - unused today; reserved for future heuristics
      Returns:
      string passed to WebTokenRulesService.take3Tokens(GameSession, java.util.List) after splitting

    • chooseTwoTokenColor

      public String chooseTwoTokenColor(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - unused today
      Returns:
      first colour (in fixed gem order) with at least four tokens in the bank, or black as fallback

    • chooseReserveSource

      public int chooseReserveSource(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - unused today
      Returns:
      1 to reserve from the table (face-up); 2 would mean deck (see CpuTurnService)

    • chooseReserveLevel

      public int chooseReserveLevel(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - unused today
      Returns:
      lowest level (1→3) that still has at least one open card, default 1

    • chooseReserveCardIndex

      public int chooseReserveCardIndex(Player player, int level)
      Parameters:
      player - unused today
      level - open row level
      Returns:
      random valid index, or 0 if the row is empty

    • chooseBuySource

      public int chooseBuySource(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - decision maker
      Returns:
      2 if any reserved card is affordable, else 1 for the table

    • chooseBuyLevel

      public int chooseBuyLevel(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - buyer
      Returns:
      highest level (3 down to 1) containing an affordable open card, else 1

    • chooseBuyCardIndex

      public int chooseBuyCardIndex(Player player, int level)
      Parameters:
      player - buyer
      level - open row to search
      Returns:
      index of an affordable card with maximal prestige in that row, or 0 if none

    • chooseReservedCardIndex

      public int chooseReservedCardIndex(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - buyer
      Returns:
      index of the first affordable reserved card, or 0 if none affordable

    • chooseTokenToReturn

      public String chooseTokenToReturn(Player player)
      Parameters:
      player - player over the token limit
      Returns:
      colour name of the gem type the player holds the most of (including gold)

    • chooseNoble

      public int chooseNoble(Player player, ArrayList<Noble> nobles)
      Parameters:
      player - unused today
      nobles - qualifying nobles (non-empty)
      Returns:
      random index into nobles
